response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack and systems engineering experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, DLang, C/C++, Java, C#, Python-adjacent) and has worked on high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of requests per second. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, telemetry infrastructure, or growth measurement — which are the core pillars of this Principal IC6 role. Title-wise, the candidate is currently Staff/Senior level, not Principal, and there is limited evidence of multi-team, cross-org architectural leadership at the scale this position demands.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background with low-latency, high-throughput service experience at Sociomantic
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source platform ownership (GISCollective)
Hands-on across web, backend, mobile, and embedded — matches the 'remain deeply hands-on' expectation
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or guardrail metrics
Lacks evidence of Principal/IC6-level cross-team architectural leadership and stakeholder alignment at enterprise scale
Limited data science / statistical analysis background for experimentation quality and bias detection

key_factors.factor: Polyglot engineering depth and high-scale service work
Seniority gap vs. Principal/IC6 cross-org leadership
